svg.title: Motif scanning as matched filtering
svg.desc: Three horizontally aligned bands. Top: the 4-channel PWM template, 4 rows by L columns, each cell coloured by weight. Middle: a DNA sequence rendered as a 4-channel one-hot signal with one cell hot per column in base-palette colour. Bottom: the sliding-window PWM score output track, mostly flat with a clear spike at one position where the sequence matches the template; 'hit: score = 18.3, p < 1e-4' annotation. Dashed-box sliding window drawn at three candidate positions with arrows from template to output.
svg.text: PWM SCANNING = MATCHED FILTERING ON 4-CHANNEL ONE-HOT DNA

g.text: Signal · DNA sequence as 4-channel one-hot (N = 40 positions shown)
Output · score at each sliding-window position

svg.text: Sliding-window inner product of template against signal — matched filter response at each genomic position.
